name: The World of Medieval Karenerria
description:
It's furry medieval time. I finally got around it!

Don't expect much, I made this public for a friend lol. This is a furry only medieval rpg, not perfect which is why I mostly work on it at times while also having fun in the meantime. This is also an established world.

Most of the chats you see here are by me (yes I have no life lmao)
creator: Sepet
